title: Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud
tagline: Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Nanjundeshwara Temple (also called Srikanteshwara Temple) is an ancient temple dedicated to Shiva in the Hindu pilgrimage town of Nanjanagudu in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: The Nanjundeshwara Temple (also called Srikanteshwara Temple) is an ancient temple dedicated to Shiva in the Hindu pilgrimage town of Nanjanagudu in Karnataka, India. It is located on the right bank of the Kapila River (also known as the Kabini River), a tributary of the Kaveri River, a tributary of the Kaveri River. Nanjanagudu is also known as The "Dakshina Kashi" or "Kashi of South". Nanju in Kannada means "to poison".

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nanjangud
topPlaces.description: Nanjangud, officially known as Nanjanagudu, is a town in Mysuru (city in the Indian state of Karnataka. It lies on the banks of the river Kapila (also called Kabini), 23 km from the city of Mysore.

topPlaces.name: Golur Bridge
topPlaces.description: Golur is a small village in Mysore district of Karnataka state, India. It is located 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) east of Nanjangud town and forms a part of H. D. Kote Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Sujathapuram

topPlaces.name: Alambur

topPlaces.name: Lakshmikanta Temple, Kalale
topPlaces.description: The Lakshmikanta Temple is a Hindu (Vaishnava) temple in Kalale, a village in the Nanjangud taluk of the Mysore district, Karnataka state, India. The temple dates back at least to the early 18th century and is built in typical dravidian style.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud?
faq.a: The best time to visit Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud?
faq.a: Stays in Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Srikanteshwara Temple, Nanjangud?
faq.a: The top attractions are Geekalli Hundi, Konanur, Mysore, Saragooru Nanjangud, Nanjangud, Golur Bridge.
